questions.q: What does Meta recommend as the placement default?
questions.explanation: Advantage+ placements gives the system more surfaces to optimize: more reach and efficiency.

questions.q: Typical effect of restricting placements with no business reason:
options: Raises the cost per result and lowers delivery
questions.explanation: Fewer placements = fewer auctions/combinations; it usually raises cost and limits delivery.

questions.q: Why does the creative affect cost in the auction?
options: It influences estimated action rates and ad quality (part of the total value)
questions.explanation: A relevant, high-quality creative raises those components of the total value and can win auctions more cheaply.

options: Choosing where the ad is shown
Automatic per-person creative optimizations (crops, music, text)
questions.explanation: Advantage+ creative adapts the creative per person. Advantage+ placements is about where it's delivered.

options: Vertical (9:16), brand early and designed to be seen without sound
A single image for the entire campaign
questions.explanation: Consumption is vertical and often sound-off; brand early and vertical format perform better.
